headline: Dick's Sporting Goods makes a $16 billion gamble
summary: In the midst of a historic retail contraction, Dick’s Sporting Goods is thriving. The company had a record-setting year in 2025, bringing in $14.1 billion in sales and closing only a handful of locations. Despite those huge wins, the retailer isn’t looking to simply coast along for the next ...

headline: SpaceX lines up April investor briefings as IPO questions swirl
summary: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX is telling prospective IPO investors to expect briefings in April from company executives, according to people familiar with the matter, as advisers scramble to file for potentially the biggest listing of all time.Billionaire Elon Musk’s space and artificial intelligence company is set to hold so-called testing-the-waters investor meetings in the weeks after the Easter holiday, the people said, asking not to be identified as the information isn’t public. headline: Memory stocks defended at Morgan Stanley on continued pricing strength
summary: Investing.com -- In a note to clients on Thursday, Morgan Stanley defended U.S. memory-chip makers after a sharp pullback, arguing the selloff reflects “a healthy pricing in of durability concerns” rather than a fundamental shift in demand.

headline: How The Investment Narrative For Informa (LSE:INF) Is Shifting With New Analyst Targets
summary: Analysts have reset the central fair value estimate for Informa from £10.84 to £10.39, alongside a cluster of price targets that run from around £9.65 up to £13.00. Those sticking with Overweight ratings at £10.80 and £13.00 sit against trims to £9.65 and a fresh Neutral stance at £9.75, giving you a spread of views on how much upside might still be available. Read on to see how to make sense of these shifting targets and track the narrative as it develops. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: How The Experian (LSE:EXPN) Story Is Shifting As Targets Ease And New Products Roll Out
summary: Experian’s fair value estimate is now set at £42.42 compared with £42.24 previously, a very small adjustment that leaves the headline target essentially unchanged. This modest move fits with analysts taking a more measured stance on valuation, updating their models while still weighing both upside potential and execution risks around the £4,100 level. As you read on, you will see how these target tweaks feed into the evolving narrative around Experian and what to watch next in the analyst...

headline: Google Breakthrough Spurs Chip Selloff Despite Analyst Doubt
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shares of computer memory and storage products slumped on concerns over demand after Google researchers touted a new compression technique. But it may be a hiccup rather than an existential threat.SK Hynix Inc., a key maker of memory chips for artificial intelligence applications, fell as much as 6.4% on the Korea Exchange. Flash memory manufacturer Kioxia Holdings Corp. dropped 6.4% in Tokyo. That followed losses by Micron Technology Inc. and Sandisk Corp. Wednesday in New York.T

headline: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF ready for ‘imminent’ launch. Here’s why that’s a big deal

headline: Morgan Stanley's Bitcoin ETF Gets Official Listing Announcement By NYSE: Analyst Says This 'Typically' Means Launch Imminent
summary: NYSE Arca approves Morgan Stanley's (NYSE: MS) spot Bitcoin (BTC) ETF for listing on Wednesday, paving the way for mainstream institutional access to direct BTC exposure via traditional exchanges.
